Fix: Revert to traditional Discord embeds (Layout V2 not available)

Issue:
- Discord Layout Components V2 is in limited beta and not available
- Error: "Value of field type must be one of (1,)" - rejects container(17)
- Bot cannot use Layout V2 components yet

Solution:
- Reverted to traditional Discord.js embed system
- Kept clean shadcn-style aesthetic with minimal styling
- Used EmbedBuilder with ActionRow components

Changes:
- Removed Layout V2 imports (container, text, divider, section, build_message)
- Added traditional Discord.js imports (EmbedBuilder, ActionRowBuilder, etc.)
- Rewrote all embed builders:
  * build_mobile_catalog_embed() - Returns embed + select menu
  * build_mobile_vendor_selection_embed() - Returns embed + select menu
  * build_mobile_vendor_detail_embed() - Returns embed + button
- Updated interaction handlers to use interaction.reply() instead of API calls
- Updated show_mobile_catalog() to use channel.send()

Styling:
- Dark neutral color (0x2B2D31) for clean look
- Minimal formatting matching shadcn/ui aesthetic
- Proper thumbnails and timestamps
- Clear feature listings

Technical:
- Removed api.ts dependency (send_components_v2, get_token)
- Used standard Discord.js interaction methods
- Fixed TypeScript errors with proper channel type checking
- Used ephemeral: true for private responses

commit.message:
Preserve row order on refresh, highlight created rows server-side

fetchJiraData now reads existing key order before clearing the sheet
and rebuilds output preserving that order, appending new issues at
bottom. Moved green row highlighting into createJiraIssues directly
instead of separate sidebar call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent random logouts by converting useAuth to module-level singleton

useAuth() was called in 5+ components, each creating its own independent
onAuthStateChange subscription and visibilitychange listener. On iOS PWA,
when the app returns to the foreground after the token expires in the
background, all N listeners fire simultaneously and call refreshSession().
Supabase refresh tokens are single-use — the first call succeeds, the rest
receive invalid_grant, Supabase emits SIGNED_OUT, and the user is logged out.

Fix: apply the same module-singleton pattern already used by useTheme.
Auth state and subscriptions now live at module scope, so there is exactly
ONE onAuthStateChange subscription and ONE visibilitychange listener for
the entire app lifetime, regardless of how many components call useAuth().

Additional fixes included:
- ensureProfile and data sync now only run on SIGNED_IN / INITIAL_SESSION,
  not on every TOKEN_REFRESHED (was firing a DB upsert every hour)
- signOut() no longer manually sets state after apiSignOut(); the
  onAuthStateChange(SIGNED_OUT) event is the authoritative update
- refreshInProgress guard prevents re-entrant refreshSession() calls if
  the user rapidly switches tabs
- AuthCallbackPage: use empty dep array (processedRef already handles
  React StrictMode double-invoke)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Full scan verification (v4.44.0, 446 questions) passed with no issues.

commit.message:
Add 3-tier question routing (short/medium/full) + backup model demotion

Pipeline B routing by marks:
- 1–3 marks → SHORT PATH: Claude + GPT-4o, direct prompt, 30 s timeout,
  no angle brainstorm, no judge, no humanisation.  Target ≤30 s per question.
- 4–6 marks → MEDIUM PATH: Claude/GPT-4o/Gemini/DeepSeek, direct draft with
  45 s timeout, parallel judge to rank, no humanisation.
- 7+  marks → FULL PATH: unchanged multi-angle + judge + humanise pipeline.

Pipeline A routing by marks:
- 1–3 marks → SHORT PATH: top-2 models, SHORT_TIMEOUT (30 s), no debate,
  no alternative methods, one brief explanation.
- 4+  marks → FULL PATH: unchanged.

Registry changes:
- Add SHORT_TIMEOUT = 30.0 s constant.
- call_models_parallel() accepts optional timeout= kwarg (defaults to
  SOLVER_TIMEOUT) so callers can pass SHORT_TIMEOUT for fast-path calls.

Backup model demotion (Pipeline B full path):
- Add _BACKUP_MODELS = {QWEN} — excluded from angle_models by default.
  Qwen was timing out on every call; demoting it avoids wasting 60 s waiting
  for a model that never responds.  It is included only when no primary model
  is available.

feat(rules): add rule hit statistics endpoint

New GET /api/v1/rules/stats?hours=24 endpoint aggregates blocked
query_log entries per user custom rule. Two-step algorithm: SQL

matching per rule. Supports ||domain^, hosts format, *.domain, plain
domain patterns.

commit.message:
Fix legal compliance for Impressum and Privacy Policy

Impressum:
- Add DDG (§5) statutory reference (replaces outdated TMG)
- Add §18 MStV reference for content responsibility
- Update liability texts with specific DDG section numbers

Privacy Policy:
- Add GDPR article references throughout
- Add legal basis for all data processing (Art. 6)
- Add all data subject rights: portability (Art. 20), objection (Art. 21)
- Add supervisory authority (UODO) with contact details
- Add SSL/TLS encryption section
- Add data retention periods (14 days for logs)
- Disclose all third-party services: YouTube, Spotify, Cal.eu
- Disclose international data transfers with SCC safeguards
- Replace contact form section with email/phone contact section
- Add phone number to data controller block

YouTube embeds:
- Switch from youtube.com to youtube-nocookie.com (privacy-enhanced mode)

All changes applied across EN, DE, FR, PL translations.

fix(대시보드): 위젯 리사이즈 시 가로/세로 크기가 정확히 반영되지 않는 문제 수정

onLayoutChange가 리사이즈 도중 중간값으로 호출되어 tempWidgets→gridItems
재계산 시 한쪽 치수가 리셋되는 race condition을 수정.
drag/resize 중에는 onLayoutChange를 무시하고 onDragStop/onResizeStop에서만
최종 레이아웃을 반영하도록 변경.

Phase 5: Voting system (#5)

* WIP: phase 5 voting system progress

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add voting system with rate limiting, optimistic UI, and aggregation

- Enhanced vote POST endpoint with IP hashing and KV-based rate limiting
  (50/hr normal, 10/hr for accounts < 24hrs old)
- Added vote DELETE endpoint for explicit vote removal
- Created useVoting composable with optimistic UI updates and toast
  notifications for rate limit errors

- Created reusable rate-limit utility (checkRateLimit + hashIP)

commit.message:
fix: keyword quality round 5 - block generic nouns and adverbs

- BLACKLIST: 병원, 증가, 통증, 감소, 기준, 방문, 구매, 마찰, 사건
- _JUNK_WORDS: adverbs (갑자기, 꾸준히, 매년), pronouns (제가, 저의),
  verb fragments (가서, 찾아, 해보세요), time words (일요일, 토요일),
  non-health nouns (냉방, 스페이스)
- _VERB_ENDINGS: 해보세요, 해보자, 봐야, 가서, 찾아, 봅시다

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(nginx): set client_max_body_size to 50m to allow file uploads

Default nginx limit (1MB) was rejecting uploads larger than 1MB with HTTP 413.
Added client_max_body_size 50m matching the backend MAX_UPLOAD_SIZE_MB default.
Also mount nginx.conf as volume in docker-compose.prod.yml so pre-built images
pick up the config without requiring a rebuild.

Fly.io blocks outbound port 25, making direct mail delivery from
